features: FAST HAIR REMOVAL - VEET hair removal cream does the job in just 3-6 minutes, so you can focus on the important things
GENTLE: Gentle and effective, VEET cream moisturizes the skin for up to 24 hours
No unpleasant smell: It is equipped with fragrance technology so there is no unpleasant smell that you get with many depilatory creams
Soothing - VEET Sensitive hair removal cream contains ingredients such as aloe vera and vitamin E to soothe the skin
DERMATOLOGICALLY TESTED - VEET has been tested to ensure it is as gentle as possible on the skin\
description: Product description Veet Hair Removal Cream For Sensitive Skin, 100 Ml X 2 Directions Apply Veet hair removal cream smoothly in the direction of hair growth, leave for 3-6 minutes, then rinse thoroughly. Safety Warning Use with caution on sensitive skin. Do not leave the product on the skin for more than 3-6 minutes. Remove the product from the skin after use. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and flames. Keep out of reach of children. See more

specifications_table.Benefits: Quickly removes hair and softens skin for up to 24 hours without unpleasant odor, thanks to its soothing and dermatologically tested ingredients.
